name: Agent Memory API

external_control_materials_map.name: External Control Materials Map v0.4
external_control_materials_map.purpose: AI-readable map showing how memory provenance, search result trust, tool permission, command execution, spending policy, budget checks, payment records, evidence packets, and payment evidence checks fit together.

okf_style_bundle.name: External Control Materials Bundle v0.2
okf_style_bundle.purpose: OKF-compatible Markdown documentation of 12 external control materials.

role_in_flow: Search Result Trust Check (Step 2 - trust gate)
purpose: Provides memory provenance records and search result trust verification for AI agents.
use_when: an AI agent needs to verify the provenance of retrieved memory or context
a system needs to check if search results are trustworthy before use
an AI agent requires audit records for memory operations
a developer needs to track memory access patterns and policy enforcement
non_goals: not a long-term personal data store
